name: rung_60_spacing_hedged_correction_direction
utterances: I think I misspoke earlier, but this is the intended relation: Mira is Juno's parent.
Kai has Juno as a parent.
To restate clearly, Lark is parented by Kai.
If X is a parent of Y then X is an ancestor of Y.
If X is an ancestor of Y and Y is an ancestor of Z then X is an ancestor of Z.
Maybe remove this if it exists from confusion: parent(lark, kai).
Does Mira end up as an ancestor of Lark?
